---
pagetitle: "Contact — Simon Yan"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.section style="padding-top:6rem;"}
::: {.section-narrow .text-center}

[Get in Touch]{.section-label}

## Let's Connect {.section-heading}

I'm currently open to any new opportunities and always happy to discuss data science, machine learning, or potential collaborations. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

:::
:::
<section class="section bg-white">
<div class="section-wide">
<div class="contact-grid"><a href="mailto:hyan86652@gmail.com" class="contact-card"><div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></div><h3>Email</h3><p>hy86652@gmail.com</p></a><a href="https://linkedin.com/in/sy31" class="contact-card" target="_blank"><div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></div><h3>LinkedIn</h3><p>linkedin.com/in/sy31</p></a><a href="https://github.com/hy86652" class="contact-card" target="_blank"><div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></div><h3>GitHub</h3><p>github.com/hy86652</p></a></div>
</div>
</section>

::: {.section .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

<div style="font-size:1rem;color:var(--color-text-muted);line-height:1.8;">

**Based in:** Ithaca, NY (open to remote & relocation)

**Response time:** I typically respond within 24 hours.

**Preferred contact:** Email for professional inquiries; LinkedIn for networking.

</div>

:::
:::
